Changelog
CursorBench 3.1
Introduced problems focused on codebase understanding, bugfinding, planning, and code review.
Improved grading criteria for some edit tasks.
CursorBench 3.0
Initial set of tasks focused on edit, refactor, and bugfix problems.
Avg cost / task is computed by applying each model's published per-million-token pricing (input, cache read, cache write, and output) to the tokens it used on each CursorBench 3.1 task, then averaging across tasks. Results are subject to variance; small differences in scores may not be statistically meaningful.

community_name: Hacker News 热门（buzzing.cc 中文翻译）
visible_range: 抓取时页面可见正文 / 讨论文本

discovery_record.discovery_summary: CursorBench 3.1 新增代码库理解、bug 查找、规划和代码审查任务，并改进了编辑任务的评分标准。排行榜显示，Fable 5 Max 以 72.9% 得分、$18.02 每任务成本居首，Fable 5 Extra High（72.0%，$13.74）和 Fable 5 High（70.6%，$10.81）紧随其后。Opus 4.7 Max 得分 64.8%、成本 $11.02；GPT-5.5 Extra High 得分 64.3%、成本 $4.37；Composer 2.5 得分 63.2%、成本仅 $0.55。共收录 36 个模型/配置，得分范围 72.9%-31.9%。
discovery_record.source_name: Hacker News 热门（buzzing.cc 中文翻译）

key_excerpts.text: CursorBench 3.1 新增代码库理解、bug 查找、规划和代码审查任务，并改进了编辑任务的评分标准。排行榜显示，Fable 5 Max 以 72.9% 得分、$18.02 每任务成本居首，Fable 5 Extra High（72.0%，$13.74）和 Fable 5 High（70.6%，$10.81）紧随其后。Opus 4.7 Max 得分 64.8%、成本 $11.02；GPT-5.5 Extra High 得分 64.3%、成本 $4.37；Composer 2.5 得分 63.2%、成本仅 $0.55。共收录 36 个模型/配置，得分范围 72.9%-31.9%。

Changelog
CursorBench 3.1
Introduced problems focused on codebase understanding, bugfinding, planning, and code review.
Improved grading criteria for some edit tasks.
CursorBench 3.0
Initial set of tasks focused on edit, refactor, and bugfix problems.
Avg cost / task is computed by applying each model's published per-million-token pricing (input, cache read, cache write, and output) to the tokens it used on each CursorBench 3.1 task, then averaging across tasks. Results are subject to variance; small differences in scores may not be statistically meaningful.
